ええっ！？ 娼館で働きたい！？: What! You want to work at the brothel?
娼館で働ける女性が足りないと司令官さまが悩んでおられました。<br>でも、なぜか:
Lord Commander was troubled that there weren't enough women to
work at the brothel. But for some reason, he didn't discuss it with me...
わ、わたしみたいなロリ体型では<br>戦力にならないということでしょうか……？:
W-would that mean someone with a petite frame like me wouldn't be
of any use...?
そ、そんなことないわよ！<br>あなたみたいな体型の女性を好む男性も多くいるわ。:
N-no, that's not true at all! There are plenty of men who prefer a
figure like yours.
でも、ここで働くにはまず、司令官君の研修を受けてもらわないと。:
But to work here, you first need to undergo training with our
Commander.
研修なら済んでいます！ 実は以前、森で……: I've already done the training! Actually, before, in the forest...
なるほど、そんなことがあったのね。研修……と呼べるかどうかは<br>分からないけ:
I see, so that's what happened. I'm not sure you can really call it
'training'... but given your enthusiasm, I'll allow you to work here.
あ、ありがとうございます！ う、上手くできるかどうか<br>ちょっと不安ですが…:
Ah, th-thank you very much! I'm a bit nervous about whether I can do
it well... but I'll try my best!
大丈夫よ。もし上手くいかなそうだったら、目を閉じて<br>お客様のことを司令官君:
It'll be fine. If it seems like it's not going well, just close your eyes
and imagine the customer is our Commander.
わ、分かりました。やってみます！: Y-yes, I understand. I'll give it a try!
そろそろ予約のお客様が来る頃ね。よろしく頼むわ。<br>衣装は用意してあげるから:
Your customer should be arriving soon. I'm counting on you. I'll get an
outfit ready for you, so go change and head on out.
――客が来たあと、リタは緊張しながら２階へ向かった。: After the customer arrived, Rita nervously headed upstairs.
